about.label: OUR STORY
about.heading: About Not Regular Events
about.subtitle: Not your regular events. Born in Madrid, built for the community.
about.story1: Not Regular Events was born from our own experience as students in Madrid. We know what it means to arrive in a new city, want to meet people and enjoy it without overspending.
about.story2: That's why we create accessible, authentic events designed to connect people. More than parties, we create experiences and new friendships — from Latin nights to reggaeton, urban and electronic, through music and shared experience.
about.story3: We create a community of students and night owls who understand that leisure isn't consumption, it's connection. With guestlists, invitations and accessible events, we bring cultures and styles together in Madrid.
about.quote: We're looking to create a space where you feel at home, meet new people and experience Madrid as a community.

auth.loginSubtitle: Login to your Not Regular Events account
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your free account and never miss an event

about.story2: That's why we create accessible, authentic events designed to connect people. More than parties, we create experiences and new friendships — from Latin nights to reggaeton, urban and electronic, through music and shared experience.
about.story3: We create a community of students and night owls who understand that leisure isn't consumption, it's connection. With guestlists, invitations and accessible events, we bring cultures and styles together in Madrid.
about.quote: We're looking to create a space where you feel at home, meet new people and experience Madrid as a community.

ambassadors.heroDesc: Passionate about Madrid's nightlife and want to be part of our team? We're looking for energetic people with good connections and the drive to help grow the most exclusive community in the city.
ambassadors.benefit1Desc: Earn 5% on every booking made with your referral code — trips, events, and more.
ambassadors.benefit2Desc: Free tickets, upgrades & cash bonuses as you hit referral milestones.
ambassadors.benefit3Desc: Promoter-only events and a private community of Not Regular Events promoters.
ambassadors.step1Desc: Fill in the application form below. Takes less than 3 minutes.
ambassadors.step2Desc: We review every application personally and get back to you within 48 hours.
ambassadors.step3Desc: Receive your referral code, share it with friends, and watch commissions roll in.
ambassadors.readyDesc: Ready to be part of something not regular? Send us your info and we'll be in touch.
ambassadors.applicationReceivedDesc: We'll review your application and be in touch at {email} within 48 hours.
ambassadors.instagramNote: In the meantime, follow us on Instagram for updates.
ambassadors.labelWhyJoin: Why do you want to become a promoter?
ambassadors.whyJoinPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself, your network, and why you'd make a great Not Regular Events promoter…
